info.description:
REST API for chat, servers, rooms, messages and friend management.
Authentication is based on HTTP-only cookies set by the backend.
info.title: VIMH API

get.description: Basic API health probe.

post.description: Authenticates the user and sets HTTP-only access and refresh token cookies.
Deletes the current refresh token and clears auth cookies.

get.description: Echoes client and server timestamps to estimate RTT. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Rotates access and refresh cookies using the current refresh_token cookie.
Creates a user and returns an access token in the response body.

get.description: Returns direct message rooms where current user is an accepted member. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a 1-on-1 or group direct message room. For 1-on-1 rooms an existing room for the same pair is returned. All requested members must be accepted friends and not blocked. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns a direct room by id if current user is a member. Requires access_token cookie.

patch.description: Updates a group direct room name. 1-on-1 room names are not editable. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a direct call session in a direct room. Requires access_token cookie.
Adds accepted friends to a group direct room. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Removes the current user from a direct room. Requires access_token cookie.
Removes a member from a group direct room. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns direct messages with cursor pagination. Pass next_cursor as cursor to load older messages. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a direct message in a direct room. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Soft deletes the current user's direct message. Requires access_token cookie.

patch.description: Edits the current user's direct message. Requires access_token cookie.

put.description: Stores the current user's read receipt for a direct message. In group direct rooms the message status becomes read only after all recipients have read it. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Streams a multipart file to local storage. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns a protected file through X-Accel-Redirect. Requires access_token cookie.

put.description: Pins a message. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Removes a message pin. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns public profiles of the authenticated user's friends. Requires access_token cookie.
Returns the authenticated user's profile. Requires access_token cookie.

patch.description: Updates nickname, bio, custom status and presence status. Requires access_token cookie.
Updates the authenticated user's avatar URL. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns room messages with cursor pagination. Pass next_cursor as cursor to load older messages. Optional q searches non-deleted message content. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a new room message. Requires access_token cookie.

put.description: Stores read receipts for all non-deleted messages in a room for the current user. Requires access_token cookie.
put.summary: Mark all room messages as read

delete.description: Soft deletes the current user's message. Requires access_token cookie.

patch.description: Edits the current user's message without deleting its row. Requires access_token cookie.

put.description: Sets the current user's Unicode reaction for a message. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Removes the current user's reaction from a message. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns pinned messages for a room. Requires access_token cookie.
Returns all servers where the current user is a member. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a new server and adds the current user as owner. Requires access_token cookie.
Accepts a server invitation token. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns public profiles of users blocked from the server. Requires access_token cookie and server management permissions.

patch.description: Updates server icon URL. Requires access_token cookie and server management permissions.

get.description: Returns all invitation tokens for a server. Requires access_token cookie and invite permissions.

post.description: Creates an invitation token for a server member or email. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Deletes a server invitation by id. Requires access_token cookie and invite permissions.
Removes a member from the server. Requires access_token cookie and server management permissions.

patch.description: Updates role flags for a server member. Requires access_token cookie and server management permissions.

get.description: Returns server members with public user info and current websocket presence/subscription state. Requires access_token cookie and server membership.
Returns all rooms from a server. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Creates a room inside a server. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns active SFU participants for an RTC room. Requires access_token cookie and server membership.
Returns public profiles of users blocked by the authenticated user. Requires access_token cookie.
Returns pending friend requests with public initiator and receiver profiles using cursor pagination. Pass next_cursor as cursor to load older requests.

parameters.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page
parameters.name: cursor

post.description: Creates a pending friend request. Requires access_token cookie.
Accepts an incoming friend request. Requires access_token cookie.
Rejects an incoming friend request. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Deletes a friendship relation. Requires access_token cookie.

post.description: Blocks a user and removes existing friendship state. Requires access_token cookie.

delete.description: Removes a block created by the authenticated user. Requires access_token cookie.

get.description: Returns public profiles of a user's friends. Requires access_token cookie.
Returns public user profiles matching nickname. Requires access_token cookie.
Returns a public user profile by ID. Requires access_token cookie.
